title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Lego Repairs Limited
body: "Application number 4950  Applicant Lego Juris A/S and Lego Company Limited objected to the name used by Lego Repairs Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 6 January 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Lego Repairs Limited is changed to 15521585 LTD. "
